backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing a service management system with CRUD operations for fitness services and static business info for Bodyshape Fitness, including blob storage mixin integration.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting a CSS change to revert --text-muted custom property from red to silver in both light and dark themes in frontend/src/index.css.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend files describing the Bodyshape Fitness website structure, components, pages, and styling with Independence, Kentucky location details.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color system defining CSS custom properties for light and dark themes with dark grey/black backgrounds, red primary text, and silver/gray muted text.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with SEO meta tags for Bodyshape Fitness personal training in Dallas, TX, mounting React app to root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: TanStack Router setup defining routes for Home and Locations pages wrapped in Layout component with type-safe router configuration.
Audio player component with play/pause, mute, and volume controls that persists user preferences to localStorage and plays royalty-free workout music from Bensound.
frontend/src/components/ImageGallery.tsx: Interactive image gallery displaying 12 Bodyshape Fitness facility photos in responsive grid with hover effects and modal dialog for enlarged views.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout component with Bodyshape Fitness branding, responsive navigation with mobile menu, BackgroundMusic integration, and footer showing Independence, Kentucky location details with 20-year anniversary mention.
frontend/src/components/LocationCard.tsx: React component that displays a gym location's details (name, address, phone, hours) in a card layout with icons from lucide-react.
frontend/src/components/TestimonialsSect: React component that renders a grid of customer reviews with star ratings, displaying testimonials from the reviews data file.
frontend/src/data/reviews.ts: TypeScript data file containing an array of six customer reviews with reviewer names, ratings, review text, and dates.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and manages an ICP backend actor, handling both authenticated and anonymous identities with automatic query invalidation on identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Empty placeholder file for React Query hooks that would interact with the backend; currently unused for this static content site.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light/dark themes, defining a dark grey/black background with red text and gold accent colors for the fitness brand.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query and Internet Identity providers, then renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Home page component featuring a hero section with background image, manager profile section for Allen D., info cards, image gallery, and testimonials section.
frontend/src/pages/Locations.tsx: Locations page displaying gym address, contact information, hours, and an embedded Google Maps iframe for the Independence, KY location.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration file that defines custom theme extensions including OKLCH color system with CSS variables, custom fonts (Inter and Bebas Neue), border radius utilities, and accordion animations, along with typography, container queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file tracking a feature to change the --text-muted CSS custom property from red back to silver in both light and dark theme modes in frontend/src/index.css.
